summary: Frontend hook `useFetchSignalsTest` was updated to handle a structured `fetchSignals` success payload and to show an English toast referencing status code/body length. However, the diff summary does not provide confirmable evidence that the backend `SignalFetchResult` type and `fetchSignals` implementation were updated as specified, nor that regenerated frontend actor/declaration types were updated. Additionally, unrelated changes appear in other frontend hooks/metadata.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update backend public type `SignalFetchResult` in `backend/main.mo` to `#ok : { statusCode : Nat; body : Text; timestamp : Int } | #err : BotError` and ensure Candid reflects it.
missing_requirements.reason: `backend/main.mo` is truncated and the diff snippet does not show any `SignalFetchResult` type definition changes or Candid/type exposure changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update `fetchSignals` success return to `#ok({ statusCode = 200; body = response; timestamp = Time.now() })` and do not parse JSON into `Signal` records.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary does not include the `fetchSignals` function body or its return statement; cannot confirm the new structured return or that no JSON parsing occurs.

missing_requirements.requirement: Keep existing `fetchSignals` error behavior unchanged (same `#err` variants/messages) and avoid changing other public methods beyond `fetchSignals` and necessary public types.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary does not show the `fetchSignals` error paths, and `backend/main.mo` is truncated such that it is not possible to verify errors/messages are unchanged or that only the allowed backend surface changed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure `fetchSignals` still updates callerâ€™s `BotProfile.lastHeartbeat = Time.now()` on the successful outcall path.
missing_requirements.reason: No visible evidence in the truncated `backend/main.mo` snippet showing the successful `fetchSignals` path or the heartbeat update.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add an audit log entry on `fetchSignals` success with details beginning with `"Signals fetched: "` plus a 100-char snippet of the response body.
missing_requirements.reason: No visible evidence in the truncated `backend/main.mo` snippet showing audit logging behavior or the required prefix/snippet logic.

missing_requirements.requirement: Regenerate/update frontend backend interface type definitions so TS reflects updated `SignalFetchResult` and `actor.fetchSignals()` type.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary does not show any generated declaration/actor type file changes (e.g., `frontend/src/backend` or `declarations/...`) that would update TypeScript types; only hook logic was updated.
